signals.headline: Major Institutional Ethereum Accumulation Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Major Institutional Ethereum Accumulation Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
BitMine significantly expanded its ETH holdings by 71,524 coins this week, bringing total holdings to nearly 4.9 million ETH (almost 4% of total supply) worth approximately $10.7 billion[3]. This aggressive institutional buying signals confidence in Ethereum's near-term prospects[2].
